daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Events and Aurora Opportunities

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-18
top_events.description: Launch of a batch of 25 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for real-time updates.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: Potential aurora viewing with a Kp index of 4.67, best visible above 65° latitude.
top_events.action: Check northern skies during the evening.

top_events.title: Firefly Alpha | Stairway to Seven
top_events.description: Test flight for Firefly Alpha, testing key systems ahead of Block II upgrade.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
